topic.title: New Featured App Request: Sekoya Labs

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Sekoya Labs
Name of the application::
Canton Watch
URL of the applying institution::
https://sekoyalabs.com/canton-watch
Emails for Responsible Persons::
tom@...
Party ID for the Featured Application::
cantrack::12208287f2b9baebe6499af23d60481a6b91a2edf587f0203e68b8706348cc8776cb
URL for the public code repository (if available)::
Not public yet
Provide a summary of what your application will do::
Canton Watch provides real-time transaction monitoring and push notifications via Telegram for Canton Network accounts. Users add their accounts and receive instant, formatted alerts for transfers, validator rewards, and app rewards directly on their mobile devices or laptops. This eliminates the need to constantly check the Canton explorer and provides immediate awareness of account activity. Potential future expansion to a web application component.
Describe the expected users of your application::
Canton Network validators monitoring reward distributions, active account holders tracking incoming/outgoing transfers, and node operators managing multiple accounts. Mobile-first users who need instant notifications rather than periodic blockchain explorer checks.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
The application will leverage various API’s for fetching transaction data and account updates. It will leverage Canton Coin for subscription billing through Cantara marketplace integration. Each subscription payment creates transaction activity.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
Subscription billing in Canton Coin (monthly/annual plans).
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
Yes, Canton Coin for all billing and payments.
On a per user basis, what is your expected daily number of transactions:
Roughly 240 transactions per user per day.
Under what conditions may a user generate multiple transactions per round/epoch?:
Users monitoring accounts from multiple telegram accounts from the same validator subscription.
How do you expect your transactions to scale as your customer base scales? E.g. Linearly, Super Linear, Sub Linear.:
It will scale linearly with users. Each additional user adds approximately 240 daily transactions.
What is your anticipated launch date on MainNet?:
The application is complete and is used by Sekoya Labs to track accounts already. We will launch asap if approval is granted.
Who will be your first customers and what is the expected go-live dates?:
Initial customers will be Canton validators. We anticipate to begin onboarding immediately after billing integration is complete. In discussions with Cantara about expansion to general users as well when the ability to bill external parties is figured out.
How would not having FA status change your operating plans?:
The application is already being used by Sekoya Labs and will continue to be used to monitor accounts. Witho

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Five North

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Five North
Name of the application::
5N ID
URL of the applying institution::
https://fivenorthdigital.com
Emails for Responsible Persons::
y@...
Party ID for the Featured Application::
URL for the public code repository (if available)::
Provide a summary of what your application will do::
A unified credential management platform for the canton network. We build a "login with canton" functionality that allows all users to login with their external wallets to any canton application. On top of that, the application is responsible for sharing credentials between apps. For example, Alice using Loop has provided KYC and Github ID on 5N ID. Then Alice wants to use Temple. Instead of onboarding again with Temple, they can just press "Login with X (loop in this case)". Then Temple immediately has access to Alice's ID and if Alice agrees, to their KYC credentials. Or any other credential they want. 

This solution significantly reduces the friction of onboarding users into apps and managing credentials, allowing for better interoperability in the network and it's expansion.
Describe the expected users of your application::
App builders who want to simplify login/signup experience and credential management for their app.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
All credentials are stored on the ledger. Credentials are shared between ID-User-Apps. All happen on-chain.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
Activity markers for on-chain actions.
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
Activity markers.
On a per user basis, what is your expected daily number of transactions:
Hard to estimate because it has to do with how active each user is in a platform. An educated guess is about 1-3.
Under what conditions may a user generate multiple transactions per round/epoch?:
If they do more than one actions on the ledger. ie, share credentials with 3 different institutions, will get them 3 markers.
How do you expect your transactions to scale as your customer base scales?  E.g. Linearly, Super Linear, Sub Linear.:
Linear.
What is your anticipated launch date on MainNet?:
October 1st.
Who will be your first customers and what is the expected go-live dates?:
Temple, CBTC. Probably same as Launch date.
How would not having FA status change your operating plans?:
Not much TBH, we can charge a fee each app provider but given that we want to incentivize usage and growth, we'd rather have it.
Does your application have any controls to prevent non-bona fide transactions?:
Additional Notes for the Committee’s consideration::
You can check it now on devnet here:
id.devnet.cantonloop.com
Note:
Next step is to have them demo the App at the next meeting. Any questions or concerns before proceeding?

Data by Kaiko are key data applications that bridge traditional financial data with blockchain infrastructure:
- Making Canton Network data available to consumers off-chain
- Making off-chain and other-chain data available on the Canton Network
- Enabling third parties to publish bespoke data products on the Canton Network

www.kaiko.com
Describe the users of your App:
Users of the App are financial markets stakeholders that need data for their operations. The App is not use case specific and caters for any type of operations in capital markets whenever data is needed or generated.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
Kaiko commits to building data solutions on the Canton Network, creating a suite of Applications, the Data by Kaiko, in order to: * Make Canton Network data available to consumers off-chain through the Kaiko API,   * Make Kaiko’s off-chain and other-chain data available on the Canton Network,  * Enable third parties to publish bespoke data onto Canton, in a privacy enabled manner,   * Enhance network value through real-world data integration and use cases, enabling Canton-based applications with data feeds.    Kaiko Read feature will enable to consume data related to Canton activity.   Kaiko Write features will enable sourcing high-quality data from an off-chain source (which could be Kaiko’s proprietary data, if applicable) and  write this data to Canton Mainnet using a secure, verifiable method.   Kaiko will deliver a generic data module enabling the onboarding of third-party data providers to deliver data to the Canton network as well as delivering data to whitelisted applications needing to consume data on the Canton network. Kaiko will manage licensing, sublicensing, and whitelisting of data from and to participants in the network.  After becoming available on MainNet, Kaiko will work to integrate Featured App Activity Markers functionality associated with various on-chain use cases such as on-chain delivery of data to Canton-based applications.  Kaiko is collaborating with Cumberland/DRW to transition their previous Canton Oracle work to the Kaiko project.  As such, both would like th

topic.title: New Featured App Request: T-RIZE Group

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
T-RIZE Group
Name of the application::
RizeScore by T-RIZE
URL of the applying institution::
https://RIZENET.io/
Emails for Responsible Persons::
madaniboukalba@...
;
michael.duchesne@...
;
eduardo.furtado@...
Party ID for the Featured Application::
auth0_007c683310db06df7d74261b04f4::12206ab3bf15b14410220357d6a6375eb1015f2e7fade1deb449463c2f2a25304889
URL for the public code repository (if available)::
Provide a summary of what your application will do::
CantonScore leverages the Rizemind framework to calculate the Featured App Rank & Performance Score—an AI-driven system that objectively evaluates each Featured App’s contribution to network health by measuring activity stability, adoption growth, relationship mapping, and elasticity, the ratio between genuine (inelastic) and reward-driven (elastic) usage. It first analyzes public on-ledger data via the Scan and Mediator APIs to produce transparent rankings, then, in an opt-in phase, enables validators and Featured Apps to train models locally through federated learning, ensuring privacy while generating deeper performance insights and recommendations. Computed in a decentralized manner, the CantonScore uses the ledger to coordinate updates across local models, ensuring full traceability and integrity while providing actionable intelligence to enhance performance and strengthen overall network contribution.
Describe the expected users of your application::
SVs, validators, and Featured App operators seeking real-time, verifiable analytics on contribution, adoption trends, and overall network health.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
The application evaluates network participation. Each leaderboard update, executed at most once per round, is hashed and committed to the ledger. Activity Markers serve as the basis for application rewards, while Canton Coin may be used separately for validator access or subscription services.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
The application earns rewards from periodic leaderboard updates, representing validated computation cycles that measure network participation and Featured App performance.
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
The application uses Activity Markers when the hash is sent to the ledger. This makes the leaderboard tamper-resistant by anchoring it to the immutable ledger. Canton Coin may be used separately for validator access or subscription purposes.
On a per user basis, what is your expected daily number of transactions:
Regardless of user counts, the leaderboard updates automatically on a fixed schedule and viewing results does not create any ledger activity.
Under what conditions may a user generate multiple transactions per round/epoch?:
None
How do you expect your transactions to scale as your customer base scales? E.g. Linearly, Super Linear, Sub Linear.:
Subline

Provide a summary of what your application will do::
CantonSecurity by AKASEC is a vulnerability scanning and pentesting service that strengthens the Canton ecosystem by providing organizations with advanced security capabilities. It helps increase the overall cyber resilience of the network and supports participants in meeting regulatory compliance requirements. As part of our commitment to the Canton ecosystem, AKASEC offers a free subscription tier that allows each organization to scan one online asset at no cost. To support this public-good initiative, AKASEC locks $300 worth of Canton Coin per month per user on behalf of the community. Organizations seeking deeper insights or expanded coverage can easily upgrade their subscription through Cantara (TheTie) and immediately start scanning their online assets to identify vulnerabilities and reduce the risks associated with their external attack surface.
Describe the expected users of your application::
The primary users of CantonSecurity are organizations and institutions operating within the Canton blockchain ecosystem, including: Node operators and validators responsible for maintaining Canton network infrastructure who require continuous security monitoring. Financial institutions, asset managers, and regulated entities leveraging Canton-based applications that must comply with cybersecurity and regulatory standards. Developers and technology providers building Canton-integrated solutions who want to ensure that their public-facing services are free of vulnerabilities. Compliance officers, risk managers, and security teams seeking verifiable assurance that their organization’s external attack surface remains secure over time. These users value automated, reliable, and compliance-aligned security scanning, integrated seamlessly into their operational workflows.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
CantonSecurity will interact with the ledger via a subscription model, using Cantara (TheTie). Users of CantonSecurity will lock Canton Coins for several months to pay for the service, and also automatically participate in reward sharing if there are featured app rewards applicable.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
Once per round, each subscription will generate a transaction to pay for the security service.
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
Canton Coin

144 transactions per user, per day (=1 tx per round).

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Texture Capital Inc. (subsidiary of Texture Capital Holdings Corp.)

Texture Alternative Trading System (ATS)

https://www.texture.capital

Provide a summary of what your application will do::
Texture Capital Inc is a subsidiary of Texture Capital Holdings and a FINRA member broker-dealer and operator of an SEC registered Alternative Trading System.Texture Transfer Services is a separate subsidiary that is an SEC-registered transfer agent. We operate a Canton validator and have integrated with the network. Our unique U.S. regulatory status allows us to compliantly issue digital securities and operate secondary markets. Today, Texture Capital already offers an issuer platform where subscribers can onboard and begin raising capital immediately. Featured App status will enable us to build this service natively for the Canton Network and to onboard a growing pipeline of real-world-asset issuers who aspire to operate on Canton. The subscription-driven transactions described above will provide early incentives and revenue that help complete the transfer agent service (Feature App #2) and support investment in the ATS for real-world assets on chain (Feature App #3). FA designation will accelerate delivery of this critical issuance utility to the Canton ecosystem. Texture Capital’s offering platform (Feature APP #1) will allow issuers to compliantly offer digital securities to the Canton Network, and allow investors to onboard and invest in the offerings. Texture’s Transfer Agent application (Feature App #2) allows issuers to tokenize on the Canton Network, and manage their cap tables, transfers and distributions. The combination of these applications streamlines capital raising by combining issuance, compliance and settlement into a single workflow. Canton Coin rewards earned will help in real time complete the APPs while providing continuous improvement across the offering platform, the transfer agent and ATS.
The Texture ATS will provide a regulated secondary trading venue for tokenized
real-world assets (RWAs) issued on the Canton Network. The ATS will match buyers and sellers through periodic auction mechanisms, execute trades, and settle transactions on-chain. It will enable institutional investors to trade digital securities with transparency and compliance.
Describe the expected users of your application::
Institutional and accredited investors seeking liquidity in private securities. – Market makers providing liquidity in tokenized assets. – Issuers and asset managers whose securities are listed on the ATS. – Broker-dealers and custodians interfacing with the trading sys

Pilot by Macao Mining is an AI-powered co-pilot that transforms blockchain data into actionable intelligence. It delivers agentic insights, automates analysis, and coordinates secure on-chain actions—helping enterprises and individuals navigate and operate confidently across decentralized networks.
Describe the expected users of your application::
Pilot is designed for both enterprises seeking to manage and act on blockchain data at scale, and individual users looking for intelligent assistance in navigating decentralized finance. Enterprises use Pilot to automate analysis, compliance, and coordination across networks, while individuals rely on its agentic interface to understand activity, optimize transactions, and interact seamlessly with blockchain applications.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
Pilot connects directly to the Canton ledger to analyze and interpret on-chain data in real time. It ingests transaction activity, contract state changes, and token movements to generate agentic insights tailored to each user. Pilot can propose coordinated actions on the ledger—such as executing transactions or optimizing asset flows—while ensuring every interaction remains transparent, auditable, and fully permissioned by the user.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
Pilot will earn application rewards primarily through user subscription fees settled each block in Canton Coin. Users can alternatively opt into a token-based model that tracks and bills for usage per block, aligning network activity with Pilot’s delivery of continuous, real-time blockchain insights and coordination services.

Pilot will use Canton Coin as its primary payment method, facilitating transactions and generating rewards

We expect to take payment from users every 10 minutes, i.e. 144 transactions per day

Any user that chooses to purchase additional tokens above their subscription allotted amount would potentially generate multiple transactions per epoch
How do you expect your transactions to scale as your customer base scales?  E.g. Linearly, Super Linear, Sub Linear.:
Super Linear as we expect each user to participate at a baseline via the subscription model but would expect some users, particularly

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Bitsafe

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Bitsafe
Name of the application::
Extension of the CBTC token decentralized-party app
URL of the applying institution::
bitsafe.finance
Emails for Responsible Persons::
jesse@...
Party ID for the Featured Application::
cbtc-network::12205af3b949a04776fc48cdcc05a060f6bda2e470632935f375d1049a8546a3b262
URL for the public code repository (if available)::
not yet public, but audit will be completed soon and it will be public after that
Provide a summary of what your application will do::
CBTC is a 1:1 wrapped Bitcoin token by BitSafe, designed for secure and decentralized bridging to the Canton Network. Each CBTC is CIP-56 compliant, and is fully backed by Bitcoin held in a secure, decentralized custody system powered by FROST (Flexible Round-Optimized Schnorr Threshold Signatures). The wrapped token is issued by a decentralized threshold of parties on Canton, and is held non-custodially by the user. This eliminates the risks associated with centralized custodians and traditional bridge architectures
Describe the expected users of your application::
Holding, trading and investing a native wrapped BTC asset
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
The token is a CIP-56 compliant token, and can be used in wallets and apps build to use such assets across the network. Uniquely, our token is build on a decentralized party pattern, where a threshold of parties submit a vote (exercise a choice) on a governance contract to issue tokens, and if a party is not-active, that doesn't block the process from moving forward.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
mint, burn, lock (encumber), unlock (un-encumber), and transfer
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
This application is an extension of the previous request we made for CBTC during an earlier cycle where we gated access to the token via credentials. That was granted to our own, controlled validator party. The decentralized party for CBTC, however, acts as a decentralized registrar. This party is responsible for issuing the CBTC token, leveraging the DA Utility Registry for token-standard compliance. Because of the system design, this party must be the one given Featured App designation for this token to be able to fire the marker on the events mentioned above. At the time of token launch, the CIP56 and featured app marker system wasn't launch and known to us, so it wasn't designed into the token this way initially.
On a per user basis, what is your expected daily number of transactions:
1-10
Under what conditions may a user generate multiple transactions per round/epoch?:
activities such as mint / transfer could theoretically happen in the same round. If people get very active with tokens, they could even be used in more complex atomic operations. Thankfully these activities should align well with the growth of the Canton Network, as all

just chatted with Bitsafe team - there was one mistake in this application
They expect the number of transactions per user per day to be somewhere around 1-10, not 1000

Provide a summary of what your application will do:
Flowryd is a network intelligence and workflow orchestration application that accelerates on-chain market formation. It uses agentic insights to automate analysis for any participant to discover their network “DNA” using their unique position in the network to recommend complementary participants, actionable connections and activate networks on-chain. Unlike awareness platforms that broadcast 'who's here,' Flowryd operationalizes 'who do you need' - moving from noise to network formation.
Describe the expected users of your application:
Flowryd serves network applications seeking to form productive on-chain transaction flows, and participants seeking to transact in active subnetworks. Flowryd provides users a way to discover network connections, navigate subnets, and activate agreements by deploying smart contracts that facilitate connections with a secure, private and auditable transaction workflow.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
Flowryd will interact with the ledger through subscription fees and contract confirmations across multi-party workflows. This programmatic workflow automation creates an auditable trail of workflow automation, verifiable offer/acceptance mechanics, and transparent revenue attribution. Flowryd will integrate with services such as Cygnet to securely and privately hash deal room documentation to the smart contracts, so the automations and payments are completed within secure, private and efficient workflows.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
Flowryd will earn application rewards through user subscription fees and workflow automations confirmed on-chain at the Discover, Navigate and Activate phase. Revenue flows from discovering connections (subscription), navigating options (API access), and activating workflows (transaction confirmations) - the full Discover → Navigate → Activate lifecycle generates on-chain activity at each phase.
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
Canton Coin: transaction acceptance and workflow confirmation fees. Activity Markers: aggregate workflow classification for network-level analytics, maintaining full privacy of individual transactions and counterparties.

We expect app users to generate payment transactions from users every 10 minutes, i.e. 144 transactions per day.
Under what conditions may a user generate multiple transactions per round/epoch?:
None

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Mandalo Inc

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Mandalo Inc
Name of the application::
Mandalo
URL of the applying institution::
https://mandalo.app
Emails for Responsible Persons::
andrew@...
Party ID for the Featured Application::
mandalo-validator-1::12207b5a4e5485a37d326b779876b836a786b99d9c18a564d6ce35aca9c6c8b036e1
URL for the public code repository (if available)::
N/A
Provide a summary of what your application will do::
Mandalo is a financial platform for people in high-inflation economies to save in USD, invest in U.S. stocks and crypto, and spend locally with a Visa card. It has integrated financial education to empower users to build lasting wealth
Describe the expected users of your application::
Mandalo is live in Colombia and expanding with a broader community launch. Our users are people in high-inflation economies who lack access to stable financial tools. We serve underserved populations where the utility of crypto provides real financial stability and opportunity.
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
Mandalo interacts with the Canton ledger at both the system and user level.

System-level: Mandalo issues MNDUSD (a Canton-native stablecoin from Brale), settles USD deposits into MNDUSD via virtual accounts, and issues tokenized stocks (150+ at launch). Visa card functionality is integrated by linking cards directly to Canton wallets, ensuring all spending activity is ledger-backed. Rewards are distributed in Canton Coins based on user activity.


User-level: Users hold and transfer MNDUSD in their Canton wallets, deposit funds that settle directly onto the ledger, invest in tokenized stocks, and spend locally with their Visa cards. Every transaction — whether saving, investing, or spending — is recorded on Canton, creating transparent and rewardable activity.
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
Mandalo will earn application rewards from a mix of core financial activities and daily utility:

Primary activities

* Investing in tokenized stocks: Each stock purchase or sale represents a meaningful, rewardable transaction directly on Canton.

* Stablecoin issuance and circulation(using Brale): User deposits that settle into MNDUSD drive adoption of our Canton-native stablecoin, creating recurring activity on the ledger.


Secondary activities

* Spending via Visa card: Every card transaction debits MNDUSD from a Canton wallet, connecting on-ledger balances to real-world usage.

* Peer-to-peer transfers: User-to-user transfers in MNDUSD support ongoing network activity and encourage stickiness within the ecosystem.
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
N/A — Mandalo does not use Activity Markers. All rewards are distributed directly in Canton Coin.
On a per user basis, what is your expected daily number of transactions:
Currently, Mandalo users average ~1.4 transactions per day. With the introduction of Visa ca

messages.body:
Name of Applying Institution:
M1X Global
Name of the Application:
USDM1
URL of the Applying Institution:
www.usdm1.com

mark@...
Party ID:
M1-validator-1::12207b40944692e083593819697e1cd87a94026afca2564253d16ff8696b233a6637
URL for Public Code Repository:
Private during review; will be made public at launch.
Summary of What the Application Will Do
USDM1 is a sovereign USD-denominated digital bond issued under New York law and fully collateralized by short-term U.S. Treasuries held in a bankruptcy-remote U.S. trust. Ideal for institutional settlement, collateral and financing workflows,  USDM1 brings sovereign legal certainty and Treasury-backed yield to the Canton Network’s regulated ecosystem.
Expected Users
Financial institutions, market infrastructure providers, and corporate treasuries seeking a high-quality, Treasury-backed digital instrument for settlement, liquidity, and collateral workflows.
Custodians, lenders, OTC desks and market-makers integrating regulated digital instruments into on-chain financing and margin infrastructure.
Interaction With the Ledger
USDM1 transfers will support institutional settlement, collateral mobility, refinancing, repo and margin workflows within regulated applications on Canton.
Activities That Generate Application Rewards
Institutional settlement and collateral-related movements involving USDM1 within workflows will generate Activity Markers consistent with Canton’s reward framework.
Does This Use Canton Coin or Activity Markers?
Activity Markers.
Expected Daily Number of Transactions per User
Early activity is expected from participants in pilot programs, including market-makers and custodial and OTC infrastructure providers integrating USDM1 into operational workflows.
Conditions for Multiple Transactions per Epoch
Multiple settlement, collateral, funding, or margin movements executed within the same epoch.
Scaling Expectations
Superlinear. Institutional instruments demonstrate network effects as more custodians, liquidity providers, lenders, and settlement systems integrate USDM1 into their workflows, enabling collateral reuse and netting across counterparties.
Anticipated MainNet Launch Date
At launch.
First Customers and Expected Go-Live Dates
Participants in ongoing institutional pilots, including market-makers and settlement partners preparing for early workflow integration.
Impact of Not Having Featured App Status
Featured App status ensures that institutional-grade digital instruments such as USDM1 are discoverable alongside comparable applications. This helps accelerate early integrations, liquidity formation and workflow readiness for institutional onboarding.
Controls to Prevent Non-Bona-Fide Transactions
USDM1 is a real asset, so it is unlikely that non-bona-fide transactions would happen and perhaps counterproductive to stop it. Of course, there are AML controls.
Additional Notes for Committee Consideration
M1X is actively participating in Canton pilots, integr

USDC Bridge

to be provided when it's available
URL for the public code repository (if available)::
na
Provide a summary of what your application will do::
Digital Asset, in partnership with Circle, are developing, deploying and operating a bridge between USDC on Ethereum and a wrapped USDC token on Canton Network. This bridge forms the basis to allow USDC to be deposited on Ethereum and a wrapped equivalent be created on Canton Network, or conversely a withdrawal request to unwrap and burn a token on Canton Network and the release of the asset on Ethereum. During the existence of the wrapped token on Canton Network, it is available for use in financial transactions.
Describe the expected users of your application::
Enterprise Clients and Entities that want to bridge USDC to Canton Network for purposes of liquidity
Describe how your application will interact with the ledger.:
The application creates USDC tokens on ledger on Canton Network
Describe the activities that your application will earn application rewards from.:
mints, burns, and transfers of USDC on the Canton Network
Does this activity use Canton Coin or Activity Markers to generate rewards?:
Activity Markers
On a per user basis, what is your expected daily number of transactions:
that will depend on the size of the Network and will be user specific.
Under what conditions may a user generate multiple transactions per round/epoch?:
if the user performs multiple actions (mint burn or transfer) with USDC during that round.
How do you expect your transactions to scale as your customer base scales?  E.g. Linearly, Super Linear, Sub Linear.:
We expect them to scale linearly as demand grows for USDC on Canton Network.
What is your anticipated launch date on MainNet?:
10/20/25
Who will be your first customers and what is the expected go-live dates?:
go-live 10/20/25, first customers will be large institutional market makers already on Canton Network
How would not having FA status change your operating plans?:
It will impact our costs and slow our ability to get our product out to the Network
Does your application have any controls to prevent non-bona fide transactions?:
yes. The bridge will have security controls built in so that only appropriate and credentialized users can bridge USDC to Canton Network
Additional Notes for the Committee’s consideration::
This app has been built as a joint effort between Digital Asset and Circle.
Note:
Next step is to have them demo the App at the next meeting. Any questions or concerns before proceeding?

Multiple transactions per epoch: possible if investors engage in several transfers or if multiple issuances settle in the same round.

We will launch our license application on Canton end of Septemb

topic.title: Featured Applications Governance

messages.body:
All -
As discussed on our previous Committee call, I wanted to start an asynchronous thread here to gather feedback and discuss ideas on how to approach Featured Application ("FA") Governance as the network continues to grow and evolve.
On the call we agreed to take a step back and ask a fundamental question--is there anything that needs to change with the FA governance process or is it ok as is.   The feedback that was voiced was in agreement that some changes could be beneficial to the process.
Below is some that feedback, in places I consolidated points that were similar.  It was gathered with limited discussion and no votes were held.  We agreed to convene here to start building consensus around some of these ideas with the goal of formalizing changes as a group.  I imagine some changes will find quick agreement and be adopted soon and others will be more complex, requiring more debate a longer timeline.
Please share any thoughts you have on these or any other changes to consider.  Where we see critical mass being built, we will bring that topic to the Tokenomics call to formally consider the change.
Topics:
While there may be differentiating facts and circumstances per application, any process/requirement/etc. should be equally applied to each application.  Consistency is important, that should be a primary goal.
Consider configurable weights for featured app rewards.  While differences may be appropriate, similar activity should have similar configuration levels.  It was requested that credential/billing apps are considered as part of this--with a goal of providing a clear and consistent message around how the group thinks about these use cases.
Consider a separate working group or Committee to help vet and propose changes to this governance.  Also consider making that group responsible for preliminary engagement with the application developers and ongoing accountability reviews of the featured applications.
It would be helpful if we refined the required documentation/information from an application operator.  This includes upfront information sharing and data productions requested.  Currently the questions leave room for interpretation.
The one point that everyone seemed to be in agreement on is how to proceed while we are working through these topics:  the standards/processes should not change until there is consensus.  We should not delay the review of a FA request while considering changes.
Please let us know your thoughts.  Thanks!
Chris

All -
Tomorrow during the tokenomics call I would like to continue this conversation.  Given there has been consistent feedback that the FA application process could be clearer I think this is a good next step.
Some topics to consider:
During the application process:
Are there any new/different types of information we want to request.
Do we want to change how certain types of information is presented.
Should we proactively communicate anything differently?
Once a featured application:
At what frequency, if at all, should the FA operator be required to communicate with the Tokenomics committee.
If there is an expectation for on-going communication, what types of information should be presented and how should that be shared with the Committee (or the accountability working group).
In the event such a requirement isn't met, what corrective steps may the Committee take.  Should a cure period be offered?  How do we communicate such a policy and/or any corrective steps being taken.
If data shared is indicative of the FA operating out of scope from the approved application what corrective steps may the Committee take.  Should a cure period be offered?  How do we communicate such a policy and/or any corrective steps being taken.
I'm sure there are other topics to consider. Feel free to add them here or share during the call.
Thanks
Chris

All - I've made an attempt to modify the existing FA application to introduce some new elements.  Additional questions that strive for additional details, information about the application process, and requirements post FA designation.
None of this has been agreed to yet.  I'm sure there will be several changes before the final product.   My goal of including some of these concepts is to facilitate a conversation about specific ideas rather than speaking in the abstract.  Conversations are almost always more productive when we have specific ideas to debate.  Please excuse the wordiness.  We can reduce the word count as we iterate on the ideas.
Will add this to tomorrow tokenomics call agenda.
Chris
----------

All - I've refined the above to include the feedback I've received and make some of the wording clearer.   The changes were very limited.  Rather than posting a new version now that may be changed based on live feedback,  I will instead add a discussion to the agenda for tomorrow's call and share the resulting edits/new version afterwards.  Goal for the call will be:
1) Review changes as a group

3) If possible, vote during the call, otherwise start an asynchronous vote.
Thanks!
Chris

What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Privacy-Enabled Secure Document Signing leveraging the Canton Network
Describe the users of your App:
Our users include financial institutions, law firms, businesses of all sizes, and individuals who need secure, long-term verifiable agreements. Key use cases include fund subscription agreements, loan contracts, shareholder agreements, insurance policies, and KYC documentation.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
Each signed document is hashed and immutably recorded on the Canton Network, creating a permanent audit trail. Multi-party signing workflows are modeled in Daml, with signatories and observers explicitly defined. Privacy is preserved by encrypting document contents so only intended parties can access them.
What are your expected daily transactions?:
At MVP launch, we expect several hundred transactions per day as early adopters onboard. As institutional integrations and asset hook functionality roll out, this is projected to scale to thousands of daily signing and verification transactions.

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Black Manta Capital Partners

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Black Manta Capital Partners
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://blackmanta.capital/
Email:
oscar@...
Name of App:
Black Manta Capital Partners Invest Platform
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
The BMCP App is a Multi-STO, Asset Management platform which allows for compliant asset tokenization, designed to globally distribute securities with integrated investor onboarding (including investor qualification; KYC/AML). The App is tailored for both asset issuers & investors (Retail & Institutional), and serves as the gateway to European digital capital markets and beyond. For issuers, the BMCP App features tailor-made solutions for any issuance that fit within MiFID II frameworks, allowing for flexible smart contracts and transaction structures. For Investors, the BMCP App offers a seamless onboarding experience, and access to alternative investment opportunities across the EU and beyond.
Describe the users of your App:
Institutional, Qualified & Retail investors + Asset Issuers
How will your App be using the ledger?:
The App will interact with the Canton Network by executing smart contracts to mint, manage, and distribute tokenized securities. When a client initiates a tokenization request, the App will record the underlying security details on the ledger and generate corresponding tokens that represent ownership. The ledger will then be used to manage lifecycle events - such as transfers, settlements, coupon payments, and redemptions - by updating token balances and transaction states directly on-chain. Additionally, the App will facilitate on-ledger payment flows by integrating with stablecoins like USDC, ensuring that both asset and payment legs of a transaction are synchronized on Canton.
What are your expected daily transactions?:
>$1bn yearly in year 1 
$2bn-5bn starting from year 2 
BMCP currently has a deal pipeline for tokenized securities of >$8bn for 2025/2026
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
Live as of submission - August 2025
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
Our first customer is BoxDepo, a tokenized Italian self-storage complex. Through our platform, BoxDepo issues security tokens on the Canton Network that represent ownership stakes in the project. These tokens enable professional and institutional investors to participate in the offering and gain exposure to the underlying asset. The Canton Network’s ledger ensures that the issuance, ownership, and transfer of these tokens are managed securely and transparently.
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
N/A

N/A

topic.title: New Featured App Request: IPBlock LLC

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
IPBlock LLC
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://www.ipblock.xyz
Email:
Ryan.Wishnow@...
Name of App:
Cygnet
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Cygnet is a protocol that brings off-chain documents on-chain in a verifiable, auditable way. It enables applications on the Canton Network to anchor contracts, agreements, and signed documents directly to templated smart contracts—without changing how those documents are stored or signed. With Cygnet, apps can prove document integrity, track multi-party signatures, power automated workflows, and facilitate atomic transactions while meeting legal and compliance standards. Cygnet is ideal for paper-heavy industries where off-chain documents will continue to be a critical component to exchanging real-world value.
Describe the users of your App:
The primary users of the Cygnet protocol are applications and developers building on the Canton Network that rely on off-chain documents as part of their workflows. This includes platforms in lending, asset servicing, fund management, insurance, compliance —where signed agreements, policy documents, or onboarding forms are required for execution or auditability. These users integrate Cygnet to anchor, verify, and reference documents on-chain, enabling trusted, automated operations without altering existing storage or signing processes.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
Cygnet uses the Canton ledger to record cryptographic hashes and metadata of off-chain documents in a secure, permissioned, and immutable way. Each document’s standardized, hashed Daml smart contract servers as a verifiable anchor that can be referenced by other smart contracts as inputs and used to validate document authenticity, track multi-party signatures, and enforce execution conditions. The ledger ensures that document activity is tamper-proof, auditable, and integrated with the broader Canton ecosystem—without exposing the underlying document content.
What are your expected daily transactions?:
While slow at the start, pending adoption, we expect the potential for thousands of contracts to be added to the system per day.  There will also be access transactions, such as attesting to the existence of contracts that have already been uploaded, fees for storage, etc.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
Cygnet’s planned launch is for 9/1/2025.
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
While we don't have a first customer secured yet, we are in the process of talking to several interested parties.
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No
Where is your code visible for review?:
Not at this time but trust-critical code will be audited and/or published as necessary.
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider in these featured transactions:
:
Cygnet::

topic.title: New Featured App Request: The Tie

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
The Tie
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://thetie.io
Email:
jfrank@...

ben@...
Name of App:
Cantara
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Cantara is a standalone, non-custodial peer-to-peer transactional and billing platform designed to enhance the Canton Network ecosystem. It streamlines payments for participants, starting with seamless subscription billing in Canton Coin or stablecoins, with plans to expand into lending/borrowing and Canton<>stablecoin RFQ trading. As a licensable platform, it enables third-party service providers to charge for services, driving network adoption and accessibility. Key features include role-based permissions, secure identity integrations (Google/Microsoft), API-driven subscription management, advanced reporting, and a service directory for listings. Future updates will add token swaps and flexible payment options
Describe the users of your App:
Cantara serves a diverse range of users within the Canton Network ecosystem, including third-party service providers, developers, financial institutions, and individual participants. Service providers can leverage Cantara to charge for their offerings in Canton Coin or stablecoins, enhancing their revenue streams. Developers benefit from its flexible platform to build and manage subscription-based services, while financial institutions and individuals use it for secure, peer-to-peer transactions, with plans to support broader use cases as features expand. This broad user base fosters greater network participation and economic activity.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
Cantara utilizes the Canton Network ledger to enable secure, non-custodial peer-to-peer transactions, ensuring privacy and trust through its institutional-grade infrastructure. It currently records subscription payments on-chain, with mirrored data in its database for enhanced reporting and user experience. Future plans include using the ledger for lending/borrowing and Canton<>stablecoin RFQ trading, though these functionalities are not yet ready and will be added in upcoming updates. The ledger also supports real-time subscription management and will facilitate token swaps in the future, maintaining transparency and scalability.
What are your expected daily transactions?:
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
August 22nd
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
The Tie will be the first user
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
We don't know how to, we will reach out to DA to do this or please let us know.
Where is your code visible for review?:
It is a private repository, but access can be shared as needed

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Five North

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Five North
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://fivenorthgroup.com/
Email:
y@...
Name of App:
5N CPM Package Manager
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Manage DAR files, Party, User on validator, Backup Node Identities and database to cloud. Provide an interactive shell access that runs inside the K8S cluster to allow gaining access to the node quicker without complicated port forwarding.

DAR management is a major pain point for validator operators, requiring a lot of labor and no straightforward way to manage versions and apps running. We built 5N CPM as our internal tool to simplify DAR management and also provide a quick way to access the node without the need of complicated commands and ssh tunnels.
Describe the users of your App:
Node Operator, DevOps engineer, DAML developer
How will your App be using the ledger?:
The app will use the ledger gRPC API to perform below operations. List/Upload/Remove DAR file Add/Create Party Assign OIDC User to the party The app has no DAML contract, purely a backend/ui component to be installed into(ideally) the same cluster that participant is run
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
The app is already working with Mainnet and ready to be install to anyone that is interested
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
ExprityCPA
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
Yes
Where is your code visible for review?:
https://dufs.fivenorth.io/dufs/5n-cpm/

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Coin Metrics

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Coin Metrics
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://coinmetrics.io/
Email:
sydnbey.rice@...
Name of App:
Coin Metrics Canton Data App
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
The Coin Metrics Canton Data App brings transparency and precision to the Canton blockchain. Powered by our Universal Blockchain Data Model (UBDM), Atlas, we transform raw on-chain activity into structured, double-entry bookkeeping records — making on-chain transfers not only traceable, but also intelligible for financial-grade analysis.
Whether you’re tracking Locked vs. Unlocked balances, drilling into sub-account activity (like validator rewards, featured app incentives, transfers, or fee allocations), or auditing entity-to-entity transfers. This app provides data on Canton’s native mechanics into accessible, actionable intelligence.
Additionally, 100+ Network Activity and Supply Metrics based on Canton Network Activity are available. 
Key Use Cases:
Financial Accounting: Reconcile on-chain events with ledger-grade detail.
Transfer Analysis: Understand value flows across entities and accounts.
Operational Clarity: Identify the purpose behind every sub-account movement.
Advanced Analytics: Create your own Metrics and Insights from Atlas data or via our per-computed end-of-day Metrics.
Describe the users of your App:
Coin Metrics Canton Data App is built for analysts, auditors, and protocol participants alike, the Canton Data App is your lens into the activity of the network.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
CM Canton Data App leverages the on-chain ledger by transforming complex transaction data into a digestible, double-entry accounting format. This structured view not only enables deep insights into balances and transfer purposes. Additionally this app will be leveraging  the Digital Asset Billing Utility App to leverage the network as a medium of payment. Users can seamlessly subscribe to data access using on-chain payments, directly aligning value with visibility.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
We have completed development and are prepared to go live shortly after the Tokenomics Committee Approval Process (Early July)
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
IntellectEU and Proof Group have agreed to be initial customers of our App. We have also spoken to Cumberland, Redstone Oracle and Maestero about their interest in seeing a demo.
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
NA since leveraging DA Billing
Where is your code visible for review?:
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider in these featured transactions:
:
CoinMetrics-validator-1::1220b6cf34a2c8937dc72403e7a8b57c80049be8aff3e5e2d992063460bdc8636466

topic.title: New Featured App Request: DLC (BVI) Holdings Ltd

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
DLC (BVI) Holdings Ltd
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://hub.bitsafe.finance/cbtc-overview
Email:
aki@...
Name of App:
CBTC (working title)
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
CBTC is the first wrapped, 1:1 backed Bitcoin on the Canton network. This can be minted/redeemed to/from native bitcoin via our secure, decentralized bridge. CBTC will be used for trading, lending, and settlement flows on Canton.

We have developed a BFT solution based on the decentralized-party design model, which requires a threshold of members in order to exercise an option on the DAML app, while not requiring all participants to respond (in case of downtime, malicious intent, etc). 

Learn more about CBTC here:
https://hub.bitsafe.finance/cbtc-overview
Learn more about our Bitcoin yield products here:
https://www.bitsafe.finance/
Describe the users of your App:
Minters have the ability to mint and burn CBTC. Holders (likely a separate credential) have the ability to hold CBTC on Canton
How will your App be using the ledger?:
The ledger will be used heavily.  1. The underlying token is based on the “holding” mechanism in DAML, and is the core representation of the Bitcoin token. 2. Signatures to mint/redeem are gathered off-chain, but are submitted on-chain via a DAML option. 3. There is a bridging management contract in DAML which manages the user’s mint/redeem request flow. This includes tracking the destination bitcoin address for the deposit, and the status of the deposit or withdrawal.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
Tuesday July 8
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
Trading teams involved with the derivatives marketplace. We’ve spoken to Cumberland and B2C2 so far. Next, we’re speaking to GSR, FalconX and others
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No
Where is your code visible for review?:
These are both private repos at the moment. Please contact the Bitsafe team for access.  DAML code:
https://github.com/DLC-link/canton
Backend code:
https://github.com/DLC-link/dlc-attestor-stack
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider in these featured transactions:
:
This is the PartyID of our node. This will be used for now. However, within Q3 of 2025, we will migrate this to the ID of the decentralized party. iBTC-validator-1::1220409a9fcc5ff6422e29ab978c22c004dde33202546b4bcbde24b25b85353366c2
Share links for resources such as demos/1-pagers/videos or other resources to best gauge your App to become Featured status:
https://hub.bitsafe.finance/cbtc-overview
https://ibtc.wistia.com/medias/ca0a3m22jz
Note:
Next step is to have them demo the App at the next meeting. Any questions or concerns before proceeding?

topic.title: New Featured App Request: MPCH

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
MPCH
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://www.mpch.com/
Email:
eli.smith@...
,
kinga.bosse@...
Name of App:
Stronghold-KMS
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Stronghold-KMS is an HSM-based key management system that protects Canton validator and super validator node keys and enables the delegation and rotation of highly sensitive Canton network keys.  
 
Stronghold-KMS provides: 
 
Hot HSM Storage for Frequently Used Keys – Integrating MPCH owned, FIPS-certified hardware security modules derisks your enterprise and keeps your keys off the node.   
Air-Gapped Storage for Master Key – Protects the overall node and the root namespace key by keeping this key in cold storage and creating a delegate. 
 
 Zero-Trust Solution designed for Canton Network validator and super validator node operators  to securely manage critical network access keys by providing The KMS-Stronghold approach creates a Zero-Trust environment that ensures every client's keys are protected from both external threats and internal exposure since neither MPCH nor the Canton Node Operators have direct access to any keys.
Describe the users of your App:
Validator and super validator operators of the Canton network to securely store network access keys and meet enterprise compliance standards
How will your App be using the ledger?:
We are using DA's Credential Billing Utility to pay in Canton Coin. We’re securing and authenticating the endpoints, securing the ledger itself through our infrastructure so that it cannot be manipulated.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
As soon as possible, targeting June 30th. Subject to external testing.
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
Liberty City Ventures and IntellectEU
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No
Where is your code visible for review?:
Our code is not publicly available.

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Kaiko

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Kaiko
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://www.kaiko.com
Email:
dlt@...
Name of App:
Data by Kaiko
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Data by Kaiko are key data applications that bridge traditional financial data with blockchain infrastructure:
- Making Canton Network data available to consumers off-chain
- Making off-chain and other-chain data available on the Canton Network
- Enabling third parties to publish bespoke data products on the Canton Network
Learn more:
www.kaiko.com
Describe the users of your App:
Users of the App are financial markets stakeholders that need data for their operations. The App is not use case specific and caters for any type of operations in capital markets whenever data is needed or generated.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
Kaiko commits to building data solutions on the Canton Network, creating a suite of Applications, the Data by Kaiko, in order to: * Make Canton Network data available to consumers off-chain through the Kaiko API,   * Make Kaiko’s off-chain and other-chain data available on the Canton Network,  * Enable third parties to publish bespoke data onto Canton, in a privacy enabled manner,   * Enhance network value through real-world data integration and use cases, enabling Canton-based applications with data feeds.    Kaiko Read feature will enable to consume data related to Canton activity.   Kaiko Write features will enable sourcing high-quality data from an off-chain source (which could be Kaiko’s proprietary data, if applicable) and  write this data to Canton Mainnet using a secure, verifiable method.   Kaiko will deliver a generic data module enabling the onboarding of third-party data providers to deliver data to the Canton network as well as delivering data to whitelisted applications needing to consume data on the Canton network. Kaiko will manage licensing, sublicensing, and whitelisting of data from and to participants in the network.  After becoming available on MainNet, Kaiko will work to integrate Featured App Activity Markers functionality associated with various on-chain use cases such as on-chain delivery of data to Canton-based applications.  Kaiko is collaborating with Cumberland/DRW to transition their previous Canton Oracle work to the Kaiko project.  As such, both would like the Committee to consider applying the previously discussed (but not voted on) conceptual support for a Featured Application designation to this project.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
June 27th 2025
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
Broadridge, The Tie, RWA.xyz, QCP, Five North.
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No
Where is your code visible for review?:
The code will be made available on demand.
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider

topic.title: Featured App Request: The Tie's Proposal to Feature a Second PartyID for App Scalability

messages.body:
Hello,
We have the following request from The Tie for your consideration
__________
Given a current limitation in the credential billing utility, we'd like to propose featuring a second PartyID to support continued scalability of the The Tie's Featured App. This does not change the actual utility of out Featured App (its the same underlying app) it just allows us to scale to more users than what the credential billing utility currently allows for. This adjustment would enable us to better manage usage growth and ensure we maintain performance and access as adoption increases.
PartyID details:
auth0_007c683dbd71f9d177d5fdd09f3c::1220d3016091c253f526645cce3a0633837b685da083bac4459dad63e61d5c97b5fa
Dr. Amanda L. Martin
814-359-6544
The Linux Foundation
Director of Program Management
Github
|
LinkedIn
|
Calendar

hi everyone
to give a bit more context on the request. The Tie is doing an excellent job onboarding users on chain, with their own validator, as customers to The Tie Terminal.
The Credential Utility scales horizontally - meaning that in order for The Tie to continue to onboard more validators as customers (they have a significant backlog of signed customers), the Credential Utility needs to add another party for The Tie and build a parallel process.
The Tie is requesting that we feature a parallel party - which is doing exactly the same thing their already featured party is doing - to continue to onboard more of the existing Validators on the Network to their product
I support this - anyone second ?

hi everyone
to give a bit more context on the request. The Tie is doing an excellent job onboarding users on chain, with their own validator, as customers to The Tie Terminal.
The Credential Utility scales horizontally - meaning that in order for The Tie to continue to onboard more validators as customers (they have a significant backlog of signed customers), the Credential
 Utility needs to add another party for The Tie and build a parallel process.
The Tie is requesting that we feature a parallel party - which is doing exactly the same thing their already featured party is doing - to continue to onboard more of the existing Validators on
 the Network to their product
I support this - anyone second ?

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Fairmint, Inc.

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Fairmint, Inc.
URL to website of Applying Institution:
fairmint.com
Email:
joris@...
Name of App:
OCP (Open Captable Protocol)
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
The Open Captable Protocol (OCP) anchors a company’s equity ownership directly on the Canton Network, bringing full transparency, auditability, and privacy to the private markets. With OCP, issuers can create, manage, and share their real-time cap table onchain.
Describe the users of your App:
Founders, CFOs, law firms, investors, and equity operations teams at private companies issuing SAFEs, warrants, equity, and managing their cap table.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
OCP writes all equity instruments (SAFEs, equity classes, warrants, RSAs) and updates (financings, transfers, splits) as smart contracts on the Canton ledger. This creates a canonical, compliant, and programmable cap table as the company’s onchain source of truth.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
ASAP — Fairmint is ready to onboard with over $1B in assets already structured and staged for transition to the Canton Network.
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
Kaiko, Maestro, and any validator willing to bring its cap table on Canton + hundreds of customers who use Fairmint on Base for now.
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No
Where is your code visible for review?:
https://github.com/Fairmint/open-captable-protocol
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider in these featured transactions:
:
Fairmint-validator-1::122047f456985651be8ea317881a9af4f04521417ce1a449b75543541acf33aac4d2
Share links for resources such as demos/1-pagers/videos or other resources to best gauge your App to become Featured status:
https://www.fairmint.com/whitepaper/open-cap-table-protocol
Note:
Next step is to have them demo the App at the next meeting. Any questions or concerns before proceeding?

Hi All,
Following up on the timeline for Fairmint's Featured App request, I received the following updates from their team today:
Their Open Captable Protocol (OCP) is currently live on Base and is in the process of being ported to Canton. The Fairmint team expects the first Canton deployment to hit mainnet
within the next 2 weeks.
Fairmint has already received commitments from 2 Canton validators (Maestro and Kaiko) that will bring their respective cap tables onto Canton once the port is completed.
As soon as the Canton deployment is live, Fairmint will begin migrating its existing customers' cap tables to the Canton-based version of OCP.
Once the Canton deployment is ready, the Fairmint team said that they would be happy to present a live demo to the Tokenomics Committee at one of the upcoming meetings (Assume the June 13th call for right now).
Please let me know if you have any questions or if any further information is needed on this in the meantime.
Best,
Chris
Christopher Kelly
Head of Business Development | Americas
IntellectEU
intellecteu.com
Digital Finance & E
merging Technologies
+1 215-962-3419
christopher.kelly@...
I

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Novaprime Innovations LLC

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Novaprime Innovations LLC
URL to website of Applying Institution:
https://novaprime.com
Email:
ivan@...
Name of App:
Mortgage Risk Manager
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Streamlines risk management for mortgage origination.
Describe the users of your App:
Mortgage Secondary Marketing Traders
How will your App be using the ledger?:
The application automatically aggregates and publishes aggregate loan pipeline data as lenders originate loans, interacting with trade execution applications and other service providers over the network to eliminate manual efforts associated with managing mortgage risk.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
June 6th
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
First technology partner: Tradeweb. First customer: Lennar Mortgage (Confidential)
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
Has been shared with Tradeweb. Not publicly available.
Where is your code visible for review?:
Available upon request

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Bron Foundation

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Bron Foundation
URL to website of Applying Institution:
Bron.org
Email:
asen.kostadinov@...
What will your App do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Bron is a non-custodial, institutional-grade wallet that combines unparalleled security with an intuitive user experience. It enables both businesses and individuals to securely store and manage Canton Coin and other assets on the Canton network.

In addition, to storage, swapping and staking of digital assets, Bron has several USPs:

- Proprietary MPC technology eliminates the hassle of managing private keys, offering worry-free recovery—no more seed phrase anxiety.
- Hidden Vault provides exceptional privacy, even in extreme scenarios such as street theft.
- Effortless Inheritance setup allows users to securely pass on their digital wealth to loved ones.
- Advanced Policy Engine offers granular, multi-dimensional control over crypto asset management—functionality typically reserved for institutions.
- Multi-chain Batch Payments streamline complex business operations, ensuring efficient and error-free transactions.
What is the scope of your App?:
Bron is an institutional-grade, non-custodial wallet that combines unparalleled security with an intuitive user experience. It enables both businesses and individuals to securely store and manage Canton Coin and other assets on the Canton network.
How will your App be using the ledger?:
The ledger will be used for billing for Bron's product. Bron will leverage DA's credential billing utility.
Date when you plan your App to go live on MainNet::
19/05/2025
Who will be your first customer for your App? :
Digital Asset
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No
Where is your code visible for review?:
n/a - we will be using Digital Asset's credential billing utility
If your App has credentials for a "review  / guest" account please enter them here:
n/a
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider in these featured transactions:
:
PartyID will be provided shortly by MPCH
Share links for resources such as demos/1-pagers or other resources to best gauge your App to become Featured status:
Please find our latest product deck here:
https://docsend.com/view/fbjnxq2mz8jskj4a
Note:
Next step is to have them demo the App at the next meeting. Any questions or concerns before proceeding?

Hi everyone
Spoke with Dmitry yesterday on this topic.
1. Here is a really nice
demo
he recorded for this group. PW is GRGiC9F@!tAGJMRmxC79of&
2. They are working on much more than just accepting payments for their service in Canton. They are working on a cross-chain swap mechanism that would allow (for example) a Bron user to use USDC on ETH to buy CC on Canton. This would be extremely valuable in increasing access to the CC ecosystem
I recommend we vote async on this - Bron is moving very fast - I'm in favor of Bron becoming a featured app

topic.title: New Featured App Request: Copper Markets (Switzerland) AG CHE-477.629.838

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Copper Markets (Switzerland) AG      CHE-477.629.838
URL to website of Applying Institution:
www.copper.co
Email:
Alex.maslin@...
What will your app do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Copper is a leading digital asset custody, collateral management, and prime services company. We support over 50 Layer 1 blockchains and 40 exchanges, operating from offices in London, New York, Abu Dhabi, Zug, and Singapore. Our off-exchange settlement network, ClearLoop, facilitates over $50 billion in monthly trading volume.

 

Copper provides institutional-grade custody services on the Canton Blockchain. Clients holding Canton Coin with Copper have the option to pay their invoices using Canton Coin. This feature adds significant value to the network by offering Canton Coin holders a practical avenue to use their coins as a medium of exchange.
What is the scope of your application?:
For users of Copper's institutional grade custody offering on the Canton Network, Copper plans to divide clients' monthly invoices (or a portion thereof) into smaller increments, allowing custody clients to pay for their services on a daily basis or even per transaction.
How will you be using the ledger?:
Invoices will be paid in Canton Coin so the transactions will all appear on ledger.
Date when you plan on going live::
ASAP, realistically May.
Who will be your first customer? :
The plan is for this to be Cumberland
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
No, Copper will license the invoicing app technology from Digital Assets.
Where is your code visible for review?:
N/A
If your app has credentials for a "review  / guest" account please enter them here:
N/A
Please list the PartyID that will be the provider in these featured transactions:
:
Copper Markets (Switzerland) AG plan to set-up a Validator for this purpose. This will be done in the next week or two.
Share links for resources such as demos/1-pagers or other resources to best gauge your App to become Featured status:
Please find attached a short presentation outlining Copper’s Custody and ClearLoop offering. This is designed to give you some context on Copper in general.

 

We plan to enable Copper clients holding Canton Coin in our custody to pay their Copper invoices using Canton Coins.
Note:
Next step is to have them demo the App at the next meeting. Any questions or concerns before proceeding?

Here is additional material they would like included.
Dr. Amanda L. Martin

The Linux Foundation
Director of Program Management

messages.body:
New Featured App Submission Details
Name of Applying Institution:
Bitalpha dba Bitwave
URL to website of Applying Institution:
www.bitwave.io
Email:
adam.keller@...
What will your app do? This will be used for announcement in socials later so make it user friendly such as on the GSF website including contacts/links:
Bitwave provides enterprise-grade crypto accounting and tax automation for participants in the Canton Network. By seamlessly integrating with Canton’s blockchain infrastructure, Bitwave enables accurate tracking, reporting, and compliance for digital asset activity.
What is the scope of your application?:
Transaction monitoring with reconciliation with traditional ERP Systems (e.g. Oracle Fusion, Netsuite, Sage, QBO, Xero), Accounting automation, Tax & Regulatory Compliance, Data Normalization and Reporting to segregate transaction types (eg. liveliness rewards, featured app rewards, etc).
How will you be using the ledger?:
Bitwave Subscription fees will be collected in Canton Coin and will leverage the DA utility app for streaming payments.
Date when you plan on going live::
As soon as approved.
Who will be your first customer? :
GSF + Others already using Bitwave and moving toward paying in Canton
Have you submitted your code for review to the Super Validators?:
N/A, Bitwave is an application used by several SV / Validators in the network and has been leveraged by many within the ecosystem

I’m curious about this “ready to launch pending featured application status” comment.
Shouldn’t the application be ready to launch regardless of featured app status?  Not trying to nitpick, but its an unintuitive pre-requisite.  Do we know what that is the case for them?
Chris

topic.title: HydraX Featured App

messages.body:
Hi everyone
To discuss today, would like to vote on HydraX becoming a Featured Application
Hydra X is a leading capital markets infrastructure provider specialising in digital asset solutions. We are licensed by the Monetary Authority of Singapore (MAS) as a Capital Markets Services (CMS) broker-dealer and provider of custodial services. Additionally, we hold a Recognized Market Operator (RMO) exchange license, enabling us to offer a regulated and compliant ecosystem for digital securities issuance, secondary trading, and custody. Our technology empowers financial institutions to seamlessly issue, trade, and manage tokenised securities, bridging the gap between traditional finance and digital asset markets.
As part of our partnership with Canton Network, Hydra X brings institutional-grade issuance to enhance the ecosystem’s liquidity and market participation. In the near term, we are facilitating the issuance of the ETH Basis-Trade Structured Note, leveraging our expertise in structuring digital securities. Longer-term, we aim to integrate broader tokenisation capabilities, including real-world assets (RWA) and other structured products, providing institutional participants with seamless access to on-chain financial instruments while ensuring regulatory compliance.
First issuance is planned to go live in the next 2-4 weeks.
